app.name: VeaCode 2.0
app.tagline: The code playground that stays out of your way.
app.description: VeaCode 2.0 is a local-first, no-backend code playground. Test HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, and Python in one tab. No account required to start.
app.author: Andra

features.title: Run instantly
features.desc: No compile step, no build tool. Write code, hit Run.

features.title: Multi-file workspace
features.desc: HTML, CSS, JS, JSON, Python — managed in one sidebar.

features.title: Local-first account
features.desc: Your account lives only on this device. No server, no cloud.

features.title: Resizable panels
features.desc: Drag the dividers to fit your workflow. Editor, preview, console.

features.title: Inline console
features.desc: Every log, warn, and error — captured right below the preview.

features.title: Full documentation
features.desc: Guides, Q&A, and changelog built into the app.
